title: toxicoscordion venenosum
intro: Toxicoscordion venenosum, also known as death camas, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and bulbous roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Toxicoscordion venenosum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but caution is advised due to the plant's toxic compounds, and it should be used under the guidance of a medical professional.
